name: Chicken Cacciatore Madre
recipeIngredient: 6 Pieces Frying chicken (legs with thighs attached and breast halves)
1 1/4 cups All-purpose flour, seasoned with 1 teaspoon paprika, salt, and pepper
1 Green bell pepper, cut into julienne strips
1 cup Canned crushed Italian plum tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a heavy large skillet.
2. Coat chicken with seasoned flour, shaking off excess. Brown chicken on all sides over moderate heat, being careful not to crowd the skillet. Remove and set aside.
3. In the same skillet, sauté onion and garlic for 3 minutes.
4. Turn the heat to high and add Marsala wine, scraping up browned bits from the bottom of the skillet.
5. Add chicken, vegetables, and herbs. Cook for 5 to 7 minutes.
6. Cover and simmer until tender, about 30 minutes.
7. Add herbs and adjust seasoning to taste. Serve 6.
